steps.title: Identify the cost structure
steps.content: The company charges \$950 flat rate for the first 2 hours, then \$50 per hour for each additional hour. Total rental time is $t$ hours (where $t \gt 2$), and total cost is \$1,100.

steps.title: Write the total cost equation
steps.content:
The hours beyond the first 2 is $(t - 2)$, costing \$50 per hour. Total cost equals the flat rate plus additional hours' cost:
$$ 950 + 50(t - 2) = 1,100 $$
That confirms C is correct.
